_publications._publicationTitle: Comparing 3D imaging devices for the measurement of cutaneous neurofibromas in patients with Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: LifeViz Micro Length 0.99 0.99 Width 0.99 0.99 Height 0.97 0.99 Surface Area 0.99 0.99 Volume 0.97 0.99
details: Demonstrated excellent reliability with intra-rater ICC of 0.99 for length, width, surface area and 0.97 for height and volume; inter-rater ICC of 0.99 for all parameters
